test_cases.description: Empty agentsDir — all agents installed, manifest created
test_cases.notes: syncAgents Case 1. synced=['agent-a.md','agent-b.md'], manifest written with correct hashes.

test_cases.description: Idempotent second call → all noChange, no disk writes
test_cases.notes: mtime of both agent file and manifest unchanged after second call. manifestDirty=false confirmed.

test_cases.description: Source updated → file and manifest updated (Case 2b)
test_cases.notes: dest content updated to v2, manifest hash updated to v2, prismVersion updated. Log includes 'updated: agent-a.md'.

test_cases.description: User edits dest → skipped on subsequent sync (Case 2c)
test_cases.notes: User content preserved exactly. Log includes 'skipped (user-modified): agent-a.md'. manifest entry not updated.

test_cases.description: No manifest, src == dest → noChange, manifest baselined (Case 3a)
test_cases.notes: Manifest created with correct hash. No file write.

test_cases.description: No manifest, src != dest → migration-bias update (Case 3b)
test_cases.notes: dest updated to src. Manifest baselined to src hash. Log includes 'first-sync updated'.

test_cases.description: Missing agents/ source dir → empty result, no throw
test_cases.notes: Early return. All result arrays empty. No exception thrown.

test_cases.description: Malformed manifest JSON → treated as empty, sync proceeds
test_cases.notes: WARNING log emitted. Fallback to empty manifest. Agent file installed normally (Case 1 since dest absent).

test_cases.description: Per-file I/O error → errors[], remaining files processed
test_cases.notes: agent-a.md replaced with dir triggers EISDIR. errors=['agent-a.md'], agent-b.md processed normally.

test_cases.description: prism init installAgents → manifest created with correct hashes
test_cases.notes: installed=['agent-a.md','agent-b.md'], manifest written with src hashes, correct prismVersion.

test_cases.description: prism init idempotent → manifest consistent after two runs
test_cases.notes: r1.installed=['agent-a.md'], r2.skipped=['agent-a.md']. Manifest entry stable.

test_cases.description: startServer options.agentsDir → sync targets injected directory
test_cases.notes: Server started with custom agentsDir. Manifest found in custom dir (not ~/.claude/agents). ≥1 managed entry present.

test_cases.description: Non-.md files in agents/ are not synced
test_cases.notes: readme.txt and config.json not copied. Only agent-a.md synced. Result: synced=['agent-a.md'].

test_cases.description: agentsDir does not exist → auto-created by mkdirSync(recursive)
test_cases.notes: destDir created, agent installed, manifest written. No pre-existing directory required.

test_cases.description: Zero-byte source agent file handled normally
test_cases.notes: SHA-256 of empty buffer = e3b0c44298fc1c149afb4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855. Manifest entry correct.

test_cases.description: Atomic manifest write — no .tmp file left behind after rename
test_cases.notes: .prism-manifest.json.tmp absent. Real manifest present and readable. Content round-trips correctly.

test_cases.description: Full lifecycle: install → user edit → Prism upgrade → user content preserved
test_cases.notes: v1 installed. User adds '(my custom tweaks)'. Source upgraded to v1.1. Sync skips file. destContent = user version exactly.

test_cases.description: Errors logged to stderr even when options.silent=true
test_cases.notes: server.js lines 153–155: error check is outside the !options.silent guard. Always logged. Confirmed by manual inspection.

test_cases.description: Manifest entries preserved when source file removed from Prism package
test_cases.notes: agent-b.md removed from source. Second sync only iterates source files. agent-b.md entry stays in manifest; dest file untouched. Expected behaviour — sync never deletes dest files.

test_cases.description: Unused `const os = require('os')` import in agentSync.js
test_cases.notes: Static analysis: line 18 imports `os` but it is never referenced in agentSync.js body. Dead code. Low severity. See BUG-001.

test_cases.description: Blueprint §11 'nothing to do' log absent for all-noChange case
test_cases.notes: server.js parts[] only includes synced/skipped/errors. When result is all noChange, parts is empty and no summary line is emitted. Blueprint specifies '[agent-sync] nothing to do (N agents up to date)'. Low severity. See BUG-002.
